text:
describes the type(s) of 
drugs. 

Applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. 

The value contains a string of binary digits; each digit of the value indicates which types of drugs are 
covered on this tier of the formulary. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_PARTIAL_TYPE_TIER_05 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Binary character string where each digit is a 1 or 0 to accommodate a variety of types of drugs; 
position 1 is the leftmost digit. For example, if the
